meaning: n.广告部门职员,拉广告者
examples: He was the most brilliant adman that any of us knew.
ADMAN: Can we get a price break from the client?
My father is an adman meanwhile an art instructor.
Iconic adman and communicator George Lois learned the secret of great, award-winning advertising at the age of 14.
Rupal Parekh, writing for AdAge reports that the spot was created with the help of celebrity adman Alex Bogusky.
